title: Title
doc_html:
SUBPART C.  LOUISIANA HELP OUR WILDLIFE PROGRAM

§70.1.  Title

This Subpart may be cited as the "Louisiana Help Our Wildlife Law".

Acts 1995, No. 77, §1.
